name: Single filer at low income in Geneva (2026)
description: Single person earning CHF 45,000 in Geneva canton (high-tax)

sources.description: Verified using Swiss tax calculation engine with progressive cantonal brackets. Federal tax calculated using official 2026 Bundessteuer tariff. Geneva cantonal/municipal tax uses progressive marginal rate: 10% up to CHF 50k = CHF 4,500. Cross-verified against talent.com calculator (CHF 45k Geneva = net ~CHF 37,480, cantonal+municipal ~CHF 3,249). Note: Actual Geneva taxes vary by municipality; this represents City of Geneva approximation.
Social security rates verified against BSV official documentation
